name: vendor.myndhyve.agent-orchestration
description: MyndHyve agent-orchestration pack. Six nodes that operate on RFC 0007 / 0008 / 0011 protocol primitives — spawn, delegate-smart, consensus-vote, message-send, skill-invoke, swarm-execute. Routes through the host's agent runtime (ctx.agentRuntime.*). Inherits RFC 0007 §F suspend mechanics for low-confidence escalation.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Agent Spawn
nodes.description: Instantiates an agent from an AgentManifest (RFC 0008) or AgentRef (RFC 0007). Returns an agentInstanceId other nodes in the run can reference. Side-effectful (allocates host-side agent state) + cacheable (replays return the original instanceId).

nodes.label: Agent Delegate (Smart)
nodes.description: Delegates a task to one of several agents based on a routing decision (typically LLM-based). Inherits RFC 0011 §F conservative-path: when the routing confidence is below `escalationThreshold` (default 0.7 per RFC 0007 §A1), suspends via ctx.suspend({ reason: 'low-confidence' }) for human approval.

nodes.label: Agent Consensus Vote
nodes.description: Multi-agent voting on a decision. Fans out the question to N agents in parallel, collects votes, and returns the winning option + per-agent vote breakdown. Tie-breaking strategies: `first` (deterministic by agent index), `unresolved` (returns winningOption: null on tie).

nodes.label: Agent Message Send
nodes.description: Sends a message from the calling agent to a target agent. Uses RFC 0007 B2.3 messaging reducer — append-only, idempotent on messageId, replay-deterministic. The target agent reads via its conversation channel on next turn.

nodes.label: Agent Skill Invoke
nodes.description: Invokes a specific skill (tool / function) on an agent by skill ID. Returns the skill's result. The skill must be in the agent's toolAllowlist (RFC 0008 AgentManifest); host enforces.

nodes.label: Agent Swarm Execute
nodes.description: Fans out a task across a swarm of agents and aggregates results. Strategies: `map` (one task per agent, collect all results), `map-reduce` (map + reduce step), `competitive` (first to complete wins).

nodes.label: Coordination Vote
nodes.description: Multi-participant voting with strategy (majority, supermajority, unanimous, plurality, ranked-choice, weighted). Routes through host.coordination.vote(...).

nodes.label: Coordination Consensus
nodes.description: Multi-agent consensus protocol. Participants iterate proposals until consensus threshold met or max rounds reached. Routes through host.coordination.consensus(...).

nodes.label: Coordination Compete
nodes.description: Race multiple agents on the same task — first to complete wins. Other in-flight tasks cancelled. Routes through host.coordination.compete(...).

nodes.label: Coordination Map-Reduce
nodes.description: Distributes work across N participants (map), then aggregates results via a reducer. Routes through host.coordination.mapReduce(...).

nodes.label: Coordination Delegate
nodes.description: Selects the best participant for a task based on skill match + load. Routes through host.coordination.delegate(...).

nodes.label: Coordination Round-Robin
nodes.description: Rotates work assignment across participants. Stateful — tracks position in `_roundRobinCursor:<nodeId>` workflow variable. Routes through host.coordination.roundRobin(...).
